text:
Parthiban Kamaraj
Chennai, India • +91 9791590022 • parthibankamaraj@gmail.com
LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/parthiban-kamaraj-386a4419b
Professional Summary
Senior Data Engineer | Snowflake Specialist | Cloud Data Engineer | AI-Enabled Systems
Results-oriented Senior Data Engineer with 13+ years of experience designing, developing, and
optimizing scalable cloud-native data platforms, with deep expertise in Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, and
data modelling. Proven ability to lead end-to-end data warehouse solutions, performance
optimization, and large-scale system migrations.
Currently leading AI adoption initiatives across ETL/ELT pipelines and experimenting with Agentic AI
for proactive monitoring, self-healing data workflows, and intelligent metadata enrichment. Skilled in
cross-functional collaboration, stakeholder alignment, and delivering high-performance systems in
agile environments. Excels in enabling real-time analytics and secure, automated data ecosystems
across cloud infrastructures.
Professional Experience
Cognizant Technologies — Senior Data Engineer
Client: DocuSign | Location: Chennai, India | Feb 2022 – Present
• Designed and automated Snowflake-based data pipelines using Airflow and dbt, reducing
manual refresh cycles by 80%.
• Led the ODS to Snowflake migration, modularizing legacy PL/SQL ETL into scalable ELT,
decreasing query latency by 60%.
• Collaborated with UI & product teams to deliver optimized certified data layers for Tableau
dashboards powering executive reports.
• Enforced column-level masking, and compliance guardrails in Snowflake to protect sensitive
customer data.
• Integrated AI-enhanced anomaly detection into monitoring workflows, improving issue
resolution time and data reliability.
• Initiated Agentic AI prototypes to simulate recovery scenarios and enable intelligent routing
for job failures.
• Documented and unit-tested all transformation logic using dbt + JIRA workflows, resulting in
a 40% reduction in production bugs.
BNY Mellon Technologies — Technical Lead Analyst
Project: NETX360 | Location: Chennai, India | Apr 2014 – Jan 2022
• Led a team responsible for delivering critical investment platform capabilities, ingesting
billions of records monthly across Banking & Brokerage.
• Developed complex PL/SQL procedures, views, and packages to support backend services
and dynamic VM-deployed Spring Boot APIs.
• Migrated document ETL workflows from Linux to cloud, maintaining zero SLA breaches
during large-scale transitions.
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines and monitored system health using AppDynamics, Solunk,
and REST APIs.
• Drove performance optimization efforts, tuning queries and reducing monthly ETL window
by over 50%.
• Recognized in town hall for UX enhancements and delivery of enterprise E-Delivery screens
with Angular & Java integration.
Techcmantix Pvt Ltd (Client: Bank of Montreal) — Oracle PL/SQL Developer
Location: Chennai, India | Aug 2011 – Mar 2014
• Developed and optimized SQL/PLSQL logic for Canada-based retail and commercial banking
services.
• Managed end-to-end ETL development and performance tuning for reporting workflows.
• Led root cause analysis and change control coordination with QA and deployment teams.
• Maintained data accuracy, wrote test plans, and ensured system stability through smoke
testing and defect resolution.
Technical Skills
Data Platforms: Snowflake, Oracle 10g/11g, DB2, SQL Server, IBM CMOD
Cloud & Tools: AWS (basic exposure), Azure (basic exposure), Airflow, dbt, Tableau
Languages: SQL, PL/SQL, Unix Shell Scripting, Java, Python (for scripting & automation)
ETL & Monitoring tools: DBT, Airflow, SnowSQL, Splunk, AppDynamics, Fivetran
AI/Agentic AI: Anomaly detection, Intelligent job routing (PoC level), Crew AI, Cursor, LANGGRAPH
CI/CD & DevOps: JIRA, Git, AppDynamics
Other: JIRA, SNOW, Visual Studio, SharePoint, Postman, SOAP/REST APIs
Education
Bachelor of Engineering (Electrical & Electronics)
Paavai Engineering College, Namakkal, Tamil Nadu – 2010
HSC – Mahendra Matric Hr. Sec. School, Namakkal – 2006
Projects of Interest
• Snowflake and DBT with Airflow orchestration – Data migration projects with Cursor AI tool
for optimising the query and creating DBT models with reference of legacy Snowflake ETL’s.
• Agentic AI PoC: Experimented with lightweight AI agents to monitor Airflow DAG failures and
simulate recovery flows.
• AI-Augmented Data Validation: Integrated anomaly detection using Python scripts into dbt
transformations to auto-flag data quality issues.

User name is John Doe.
User is an AI Engineer.
User is interested in AI Agents.
User is based in San Francisco, California.
